Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT

Title: Establishes an economic grant program for the Second Avenue Subway construction project area
Summary: Establishes an economic development grant program for the Second Avenue Subway construction project area.
LawSection: New York State Urban Development Corporation Act
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the New York state urban development corporation act, in relation to establishing a Second Avenue Subway construction economic development grant program
